debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
hf_bounded : ∀ (x : ↑(spectrum ℂ a)), ‖f x‖ ≤ C
hX : Measurable f
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C

failed_attempts:
apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ _).trans
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity)
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation
      ≤ ∫⁻ _, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation :=
        lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_of_real (hf_bounded z))
    _ = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
        by rw [lintegral_const, mul_comm]
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
        mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) :=
        by simp [← ENNReal.ofReal_mul, mul_assoc]

rw [ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm]
  refine (ENNReal.toReal_mono (ComplexMeasure.IsFinite.ennorm_set_univ_lt_top _) ?_).trans ?_
  · rw [lintegral_const, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    · exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded _)
    · exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  · rw [ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal, ENNReal.norm_toReal, ENNReal.norm_toReal]
    · ring_nf
      have hC : ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C ≥ 0 := by
        by_cases h : Nonempty (spectrum ℂ a)
        · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) (norm_nonneg _)) ((norm_nonneg (f h.some)).trans (hf_bounded h.some))
        · have : x = 0 := by
            rcases inst✝.subsingleton_or_nontrivial with hH | hH
            · exact Subsingleton.elim x 0
            · exact (h (spectrum.nonempty a)).elim
          simp [this]
      rw [Real.toNNReal_of_nonneg (by positivity), Real.toNNReal_of_nonneg (by positivity)]
      exact (Real.le_toNNReal_iff_coe_le.2 hC).trans (le_rfl)
    · exact ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top
    · exact ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top

set μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  refine (μ.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm f).trans (ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal ?_)
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.ennorm ≤ ∫⁻ _, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂μ.ennorm :=
      lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal C * μ.ennorm Set.univ := lintegral_const _
    _ ≤ ENNReal.ofReal C * (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) :=
      ENNReal.mul_left_mono (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
      rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x), ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))]
      congr 1; ring

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le hX hf_bounded).trans
  rw [mul_comm]
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right
  · apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))
    rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x)]
    exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
  · rcases isEmpty_or_nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) with hS | ⟨z⟩
    · have : x = 0 := by
        by_contra hx; haveI := nontrivial_of_ne x 0; exact (spectrum.nonempty a).not_isEmpty hS
      simp [this]
    · exact (norm_nonneg (f z)).trans (hf_bounded z)

set μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
    rcases isEmpty_or_nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) with h | h
    · haveI := (spectrum.nontrivial_iff_nonempty a).not.mp h
      simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0]
    · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)) ((norm_nonneg (f h.some)).trans (hf_bounded h.some))
  refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral μ f).trans ?_
  rw [ENNReal.toReal_le_iff_le_ofReal h_nonneg]
  refine (MeasureTheory.lintegral_le_const _ (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))).trans ?_
  refine (mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _).trans_eq ?_
  simp [h_nonneg, ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x), ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg y)]

have h_var := ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))
    (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)
  if hC : 0 ≤ C then
    exact (VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le hX hf_bounded _).trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h_var hC)
  else
    have : x = 0 := by
      have h_empty : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := ⟨λ z => hC ((norm_nonneg (f z)).trans (hf_bounded z))⟩
      have := spectrum.isEmpty_iff_subsingleton.1 (Set.isEmpty_coe_sort.1 h_empty)
      exact (ext_iff.1 (Subsingleton.elim 0 (1 : H →L[ℂ] H)) x).symm
    simp [this]

by_cases hx : x = 0; · simp [hx]
  haveI : Nontrivial H := nontrivial_of_ne 0 hx
  have hC : 0 ≤ C := (norm_nonneg (f (spectrum.nonempty a).some)).trans (hf_bounded _)
  apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans
  refine (ENNReal.toReal_mono ?_ ?_).trans ?_
  · exact ENNReal.mul_ne_top (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top) ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top
  · rw [← lintegral_const, Measure.restrict_univ, mul_comm]
    exact lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
  · exact ENNReal.mul_right_mono (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)
  · simp [hC, ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal, mul_assoc]

refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm f _).trans ?_
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal
  · positivity
  · calc
      ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennorm
        ≤ ∫⁻ _, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennorm :=
          lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
      _ = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C := by
          rw [lintegral_const, mul_comm]; rfl
      _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
          ENNReal.mul_le_mul (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) le_rfl
      _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
          simp only [ENNReal.ofReal_norm, ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul, mul_assoc]

refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans ?_
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal
  · positivity
  · calc
      ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennreal_variation
        ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C := by
          rw [MeasureTheory.lintegral_const, MeasureTheory.Measure.ennreal_variation_apply, Set.univ_inter]
          exact MeasureTheory.lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
      _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
          ENNReal.mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded x y) _
      _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
          simp [← ENNReal.ofReal_mul, norm_nonneg]

have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
    rcases (spectrum ℂ a).isEmpty_or_nonempty with h | ⟨z⟩
    · rcases subsingleton_or_nontrivial H with h' | h'
      · simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0]
      · exact (spectrum.nonempty a).elim h.false
    · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)) ((norm_nonneg (f z)).trans (hf_bounded z))
  apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans
  rw [ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_of_real h_nonneg, ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x), ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg y)]
  apply (lintegral_le_const _ (fun z ↦ ENNReal.ofReal_le_of_real (hf_bounded z))).trans
  exact ENNReal.mul_le_mul (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) le_rfl

refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ _).trans ?_
  have hC : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
    by_cases hx : x = 0; · simp [hx]
    haveI : Nontrivial H := ⟨x, 0, hx⟩
    obtain ⟨z, _⟩ := spectrum.nonempty a
    exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)) ((norm_nonneg (f z)).trans (hf_bounded z))
  rw [ENNReal.toReal_le_iff_le_ofReal hC]
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennvariation
      ≤ ∫⁻ _, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennvariation :=
      lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
    _ = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
      by rw [lintegral_const, ComplexMeasure.ennvariation_apply, mul_comm]
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
      mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
      simp only [ENNReal.ofReal_norm, ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x),
        ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))]
      ring_nf

  · refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le hX hf_bounded).trans ?_

    exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity)

  · have : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := ⟨fun z => hC.not_le ((norm_nonneg (f z)).trans (hf_bounded z))⟩

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennvariation
      ≤ ∫⁻ _z, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennvariation :=
        MeasureTheory.lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
    _ = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennvariation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C := by
        rw [MeasureTheory.lintegral_const, mul_comm]
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
        mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
        rw [ENNReal.ofReal_mul (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)),
          ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x), ENNReal.ofReal_norm, ENNReal.ofReal_norm]

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm f _).trans
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennreal_variation
      ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
        lintegral_le_const _ (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
        mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
        simp only [ENNReal.ofReal_norm, ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg _)]
        by_cases h : 0 ≤ C
        · simp [h, ENNReal.ofReal_mul, norm_nonneg]
        · simp [le_of_lt (not_le.mp h), ENNReal.ofReal_eq_zero,
            mul_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))]

refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le _ hX hf_bounded).trans ?_
  by_cases hC : 0 ≤ C
  · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_of_real (by positivity)
      ((cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y).trans_eq (by simp))) hC
  · haveI : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := ⟨fun z => (hf_bounded z).not_lt (not_le.mp hC |>.trans_le' (norm_nonneg _))⟩
    have hx : x = 0 := (spectrum.empty_iff.mp (Set.eq_empty_of_isEmpty (spectrum ℂ a))).subsingleton.elim x 0
    simp [hx, cfc_toComplexMeasure, cfc_toLinearFunctional]

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm f hX).trans
  have h_bound : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennnorm.lintegral (fun x => ‖f x‖₊) ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
    (MeasureTheory.lintegral_le_const _ _ (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))).trans
      (ENNReal.mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _)
  apply (ENNReal.toReal_mono (by finiteness) h_bound).trans
  simp only [ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal, norm_nonneg, coe_nnnorm]
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_max_right 0 C) (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation
      ≤ ∫⁻ _, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation :=
        lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
    _ = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C := by
        rw [lintegral_const, mul_comm]
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
        ENNReal.mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
        simp [← ENNReal.ofReal_mul, norm_nonneg, mul_assoc, ENNReal.ofReal_norm]

by_cases hC : 0 ≤ C
  · have h_le : ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation ≤ ‖x‖₊ * ‖y‖₊ * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
      (lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))).trans
        (by rw [lintegral_const]; exact mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _)
    refine ((cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm f).trans
      ((ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal (ComplexMeasure.lintegral_norm_finite _ _) (by simp)).mpr h_le |>.trans ?_)
    simp [hC]
  · have : IsEmpty (↑(spectrum ℂ a)) := ⟨fun z => hC ((norm_nonneg (f z)).trans (hf_bounded z))⟩
    haveI := spectrum.empty_iff.mp (Set.isEmpty_coe_sort.mp this)
    simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0]

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennreal_variation ≤
        ∫⁻ _, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennreal_variation :=
      lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal C * (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ :=
      by rw [lintegral_const, ComplexMeasure.ennreal_variation_apply]
    _ ≤ ENNReal.ofReal C * (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) :=
      mul_le_mul_left' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
      simp only [ENNReal.ofReal_norm]
      rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_mul, ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul]
      · ring
      · exact norm_nonneg x
      · exact mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)

refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans (ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal ?_)
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennnorm
      ≤ ∫⁻ _, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennnorm := lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
    _ = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennnorm Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C := by rw [lintegral_const, mul_comm]
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C := mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)), ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x)]

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ _).trans
  have h := (lintegral_le_const _ _ fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_of_real (hf_bounded z)).trans
    (mul_le_mul_left' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _)
  exact (ENNReal.toReal_mono (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top
    (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.coe_ne_top ENNReal.coe_ne_top)) h).trans
    (by simp [ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal, norm_nonneg, mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm])

refine (VectorMeasure.norm_integral_le_variation_norm _ hX hf_bounded).trans ?_
  rcases isEmpty_or_nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) with h | ⟨z⟩
  · have : ‖x‖ = 0 := by
      have h0 := (spectrum_eq_empty_iff (𝕜 := ℂ) (a := a)).mp (not_nonempty_iff.mp (not_nonempty_of_isEmpty _))
      rcases h0; exact norm_eq_zero.mpr (Subsingleton.elim x 0)
    simp [this, VectorMeasure.variation_empty, h]
  · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity)
      (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)) ((norm_nonneg (f z)).trans (hf_bounded z))

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ _).trans
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_ofReal
  · rcases (spectrum ℂ a).eq_empty_or_nonempty with h | h
    · cases subsingleton_or_nontrivial H
      · simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0]
      · exact (h (NormedSpace.spectrum_nonempty a)).elim
    · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)) (le_trans (norm_nonneg (f h.some)) (hf_bounded h.some))
  · calc
      ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation
        ≤ ∫⁻ _, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation := lintegral_mono (λ z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
      _ = ENNReal.ofReal C * (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ := by rw [lintegral_const]
      _ ≤ ENNReal.ofReal C * (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) := mul_le_mul_left' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
      _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
        simp only [ENNReal.ofReal_mul, norm_nonneg, mul_comm, mul_assoc, ENNReal.ofReal_norm]

by_cases hC : 0 ≤ C
  · refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_integral_norm f _).trans ?_
    refine (MeasureTheory.integral_le_const _ (fun z => ‖f z‖) C hf_bounded).trans ?_
    exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity) (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)) hC
  · haveI : IsEmpty (spectrum ℂ a) := ⟨fun z => hC.not_le ((norm_nonneg (f z)).trans (hf_bounded z))⟩
    haveI : Subsingleton H := Module.subsingleton_iff ℂ H |>.mp (spectrum.isEmpty_iff_subsingleton.mp (Set.eq_empty_of_isEmpty _))
    simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0, cfc_toComplexMeasure, cfc_toLinearFunctional, toLinearFunctional]

refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ _).trans ?_
  have hC : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
    by_cases h : (spectrum ℂ a).Nonempty
    · exact h.elim fun s hs => mul_nonneg (by positivity) ((norm_nonneg (f ⟨s, hs⟩)).trans (hf_bounded ⟨s, hs⟩))
    · have : x = 0 := by { by_contra hx; haveI := nontrivial_of_ne x 0 hx; exact h (spectrum.nonempty a) }
      simp [this]
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal hC
  refine (lintegral_le_const _ fun s => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded s)).trans ?_
  refine (mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded x y) _).trans ?_
  simp [← ENNReal.ofReal_mul, norm_nonneg]

refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans ?_
  apply (ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal ?_ ?_).trans
  · calc ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennreal_variation
        ≤ ∫⁻ _z, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennreal_variation :=
          lintegral_mono (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
      _ = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
          by rw [lintegral_const, ENNReal.mul_comm, Measure.ennreal_variation_apply]
      _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C :=
          ENNReal.mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
  · simp [ENNReal.mul_eq_top]
  · simp [ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal, norm_nonneg]
    rcases isEmpty_or_nonempty (spectrum ℂ a) with h | h
    · haveI := spectrum.isEmpty_iff.mp h
      haveI : Subsingleton H := ContinuousLinearMap.subsingleton_iff.mp ‹_›
      simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0]
    · simp [(norm_nonneg (f h.some)).trans (hf_bounded h.some)]

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans
  have hC : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
    rcases (spectrum ℂ a).eq_empty_or_nonempty with h | h
    · haveI : Subsingleton H := ⟨fun u v => by
        haveI : Subsingleton (H →L[ℂ] H) := by contrapose! h; exact spectrum.nonempty a
        rw [← ContinuousLinearMap.id_apply (R := ℂ) u, ← ContinuousLinearMap.id_apply (R := ℂ) v, Subsingleton.elim (ContinuousLinearMap.id ℂ H) 0]; simp⟩
      simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0]
    · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y)) ((norm_nonneg (f h.choose)).trans (hf_bounded _))
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal hC
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation
      = ∫⁻ z in Set.univ, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation := by rw [set_lintegral_univ]
    _ ≤ (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ * ENNReal.ofReal C := set_lintegral_le_const _ _ (fun z _ => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) * ENNReal.ofReal C := ENNReal.mul_right_mono (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
    _ = ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
      rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_norm_eq_coe, ← ENNReal.ofReal_norm_eq_coe, ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x), ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))]

have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
    if h : Nontrivial H then
      exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) (norm_nonneg _))
        ((spectrum.nonempty a).elim fun z _ => (norm_nonneg _).trans (hf_bounded z))
    else
      haveI := not_nontrivial_iff_subsingleton.mp h
      simp [Subsingleton.elim x 0]
  rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal_iff h_nonneg, ENNReal.ofReal_mul (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) (norm_nonneg _))]
  refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans ?_
  refine (lintegral_mono fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z)).trans ?_
  rw [lintegral_const, mul_comm]
  exact mul_le_mul_right' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_norm _ f).trans
  apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal
  calc
    ∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).ennvariation
      ≤ ENNReal.ofReal C * (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).variation Set.univ :=
      lintegral_le_const (fun z => ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z))
    _ ≤ ENNReal.ofReal C * (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ) :=
      mul_le_mul_left' (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y) _
    _ ≤ ENNReal.ofReal (‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C) := by
      simp [mul_comm, mul_assoc, ENNReal.ofReal_mul_ofReal_le, ENNReal.ofReal_norm]

by_cases h : Subsingleton H
  · simp [Subsingleton.elim x (0 : H)]
  · haveI : Nonzero (H →L[ℂ] H) := nonzero_iff_non_singleton.mpr h
    have hC : 0 ≤ C := (spectrum.nonempty a).elim (fun z => (norm_nonneg (f z)).trans (hf_bounded z))
    refine (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const _ hX hf_bounded).trans ?_
    exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg y))
      (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)) hC

apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_of_norm_le_const hX hf_bounded).trans
  gcongr
  exact ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by positivity) (cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y)
